description_long: This object is a dark, military-style jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The wings are mid-mounted and feature a noticeable anhedral angle, giving the aircraft a distinctive downward slant. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the right stabilizer painted in a lighter color. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a streamlined canopy. The surface of the airplane is finished in a dark, metallic color with some lighter markings and insignia, suggesting a tactical or combat role. The overall design emphasizes speed and maneuverability, with minimal external protrusions and a compact, efficient form.
description: A dark, swept-wing military jet with a streamlined fuselage, mid-mounted wings, and a single vertical tail fin. The airplane features an enclosed forward cockpit and a metallic finish with tactical markings.
description_view_0: Front-top view showing the sharply pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the mid-mounted wings, and the single vertical stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, including the single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the right stabilizer in a lighter color.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the streamlined body, wing sweep, and the placement of the cockpit and tail surfaces.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept-back wings with anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main and nose gear units implied by typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
